GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [channel@0 ASC, id@1 ASC]
  GpuSortExec: expr=[channel@0 ASC, id@1 ASC], fetch=100
    GpuProjectExec: expr=[channel@0 as channel, id@1 as id, sum(x.sales)@3 as sales, sum(x.returns_)@4 as returns_, sum(x.profit)@5 as profit]
      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[channel, id, __grouping_id], aggr=[sum(x.sales), sum(x.returns_), sum(x.profit)]
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=3167380
          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([channel@0, id@1, __grouping_id@2], 8), input_partitions=24
            GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[channel, id], aggr=[sum(x.sales), sum(x.returns_), sum(x.profit)]
              GpuUnionExec
